judge_reason: Both descriptions agree on the main visual content (a photograph of two seated men, the caption text) but Description B adds extra headlines and byline not mentioned in Description A without contradicting it.
original_image_tags: black-and-white newspaper photograph of two men seated, appearing to be in conversation. The man on the left is in a dark uniform; the man on the right is in a light-colored shirt and tie. A caption below reads: "EAL FLIERS DESCRIBE WINGLESS AIRCRAFT. Copilot John Whitted and Capt. C. S. Chiles (right)."
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: A clipped newspaper article from the Atlanta Journal dated Sunday, 7/25/48, with a black-and-white photograph of two seated men gesturing toward each other and headlines reading “‘Sky Devil-Ship’ Scares Pilots; Air Chief Wishes He Had One” and “Plane Makers Dubious About Alabama ‘Thing’.”*
